paragraphs: You have an Egyptian toe form with medium-width forefoot and a very wide heel. A mixed profile; forefoot and heel require different fits.

Beyond the obvious: Given your particularly long arch, the ball of your foot may be pushed into the toe box. A squeezed forefoot may be caused by this instead of actual shoe width, so look for rather short toe boxes. Additionally your instep is particularly high, so an adjustable closure is preferable to actually get into the shoe. Ideally double velcro or laces, you may struggle getting into slippers if adequately downsized. Your deep heel projects further back than most, so a deeper, more sculpted heel cup fits naturally.
interpretation.title: Your Foot Shape

paragraphs: Your La Sportiva Skwama Vegan (EU 39.5, 2.5 down) is a typical fit for La Sportiva, where the usual downsize is 2.5 sizes.
interpretation.title: What Your Current Shoe Fit Tells Us

paragraphs: Based on your scan and current shoe fit, we target shoes with Egyptian toe form, normal forefoot width, and wide heel width.
Given your preference for bouldering outdoors on sandstone and an aggressive fit, we prioritize soft slippers or velcros with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry.
The softer, stiffer, and budget tiers below offer alternative options around this target.
interpretation.title: What to Look For

recommendations.description: Velcro with Egyptian toe form, medium forefoot and a wide heel cup. 4mm Vibram XS Grip2 rubber with a toe-only, medium-hard midsole, resulting in a medium-soft shoe with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Slightly stiffer than we target.

recommendations.description: Velcro with Egyptian toe form, medium fit throughout. 4.2mm TRAX SAS rubber with a partial, soft midsole, resulting in a soft shoe with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Slightly tighter in the heel than we target.

recommendations.description: Velcro with Egyptian toe form, medium fit throughout. 4.3mm NeoFriction Fuse rubber with a partial, soft midsole, resulting in a soft shoe with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Slightly tighter in the heel than we target.

recommendations.description: Velcro with Egyptian toe form, medium fit throughout. 3.5mm Vibram XS Grip 2 rubber with a toe-only, soft midsole, resulting in a soft shoe with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Slightly tighter in the heel than we target.

recommendations.description: Velcro with Egyptian/Greek toe form, medium fit throughout. 4mm CAT 1.5 rubber with a toe-only, soft midsole, resulting in a soft shoe with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Slightly tighter in the heel than we target.

recommendations.description: Velcro with Egyptian toe form, medium fit throughout. 3.5mm Vibram XS Grip2 rubber with a toe-only, medium-soft midsole, resulting in a soft shoe with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Slightly tighter in the heel than we target.

recommendations.description: Velcro with Egyptian toe form, medium fit throughout. 3.5mm Vibram XS Grip rubber with a half-length, medium midsole, resulting in a medium-soft shoe with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Slightly tighter in the heel than we target.

recommendations.description: Velcro with Greek toe form, medium forefoot and a wide heel cup, high forefoot volume. 3.5mm RS rubber with a forefoot, medium-hard midsole, resulting in a balanced-stiffness shoe with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry. Narrow but high volume forefoot. May suit duck feet who need vertical space. Reviewer with wide forefoot/high arch found good conforming fit.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Greek toe form might not be a perfect fit for your Egyptian toe.

recommendations.description: Velcro with Egyptian toe form, wide fit throughout, high forefoot volume. 4mm Vibram XS Grip rubber with no midsole, resulting in a soft shoe with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Slightly wider in the forefoot than we target.

recommendations.description: Velcro with Egyptian toe form, medium forefoot and a narrow heel cup. 4mm CAT 1.5 rubber with a half-length, medium midsole, resulting in a medium-soft shoe with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry. At EUR 93, a strong-value pick.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Tighter in the heel and slightly stiffer than we target.

recommendations.description: Velcro with Egyptian toe form, medium forefoot and a narrow heel cup, high forefoot volume. 4mm Zenith Ultra rubber with no midsole, resulting in a very soft shoe with aggressive downturn and strong asymmetry. At EUR 100, a strong-value pick.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Tighter in the heel and slightly softer than we target.

recommendations.description: Velcro with Egyptian toe form, medium fit throughout. 4mm DS Max rubber with no midsole, resulting in a very soft shoe with moderate downturn and strong asymmetry. At EUR 101, a strong-value pick.
recommendations.tradeoffs: Tradeoff: Slightly tighter in the heel, slightly less downturned, and slightly softer than we target.
